english_name: The First Epistle of Paul the Apostle to the Thessalonians

verses.latin_vulgate: De temporibus autem, et momentis, fratres, non indigetis ut scribamus vobis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: περὶ δὲ τῶν χρόνων καὶ τῶν καιρῶν ἀδελφοί οὐ χρείαν ἔχετε ὑμῖν γράφεσθαι
verses.king_james: But of the times and the seasons, brethren, ye have no need that I write unto you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi enim diligenter scitis quia dies Domini, sicut fur in nocte, ita veniet:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: αὐτοὶ γὰρ ἀκριβῶς οἴδατε ὅτι ἡ ἡμέρα κυρίου ὡς κλέπτης ἐν νυκτὶ οὕτως ἔρχεται
verses.king_james: For yourselves know perfectly that the day of the Lord so cometh as a thief in the night.

verses.latin_vulgate: cum enim dixerint: Pax et securitas: tunc repentinus eis superveniet interitus, sicut dolor in utero habenti, et non effugient.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὅταν γὰρ λέγωσιν εἰρήνη καὶ ἀσφάλεια τότε αἰφνίδιος αὐτοῖς ἐφίσταται ὄλεθρος ὥσπερ ἡ ὠδὶν τῇ ἐν γαστρὶ ἐχούσῃ καὶ οὐ μὴ ἐκφύγωσιν
verses.king_james: For when they shall say, Peace and safety; then sudden destruction cometh upon them, as travail upon a woman with child; and they shall not escape.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vos autem, fratres, non estis in tenebris, ut vos die illa tamquam fur comprehendat:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὑμεῖς δέ ἀδελφοί οὐκ ἐστὲ ἐν σκότει ἵνα ἡ ἡμέρα ὑμᾶς ὡς κλέπτης καταλάβῃ
verses.king_james: But ye, brethren, are not in darkness, that that day should overtake you as a thief.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnes enim vos filii lucis estis, et filii diei: non sumus noctis, neque tenebrarum.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πάντες ὑμεῖς υἱοὶ φωτός ἐστε καὶ υἱοὶ ἡμέρας οὐκ ἐσμὲν νυκτὸς οὐδὲ σκότους
verses.king_james: Ye are all the children of light, and the children of the day: we are not of the night, nor of darkness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur non dormiamus sicut et ceteri, sed vigilemus, et sobrii simus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἄρα οὖν μὴ καθεύδωμεν ὡς καὶ οἱ λοιποί ἀλλὰ γρηγορῶμεν καὶ νήφωμεν
verses.king_james: Therefore let us not sleep, as *do* others; but let us watch and be sober.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui enim dormiunt, nocte dormiunt: et qui ebrii sunt, nocte ebrii sunt.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: οἱ γὰρ καθεύδοντες νυκτὸς καθεύδουσιν καὶ οἱ μεθυσκόμενοι νυκτὸς μεθύουσιν
verses.king_james: For they that sleep sleep in the night; and they that be drunken are drunken in the night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nos autem, qui diei sumus, sobrii simus, induti loricam fidei et caritatis, et galeam spem salutis:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἡμεῖς δὲ ἡμέρας ὄντες νήφωμεν ἐνδυσάμενοι θώρακα πίστεως καὶ ἀγάπης καὶ περικεφαλαίαν ἐλπίδα σωτηρίας
verses.king_james: But let us, who are of the day, be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love; and for an helmet, the hope of salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam non posuit nos Deus in iram, sed in acquisitionem salutis per Dominum nostrum Jesum Christum,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὅτι οὐκ ἔθετο ἡμᾶς ὁ θεὸς εἰς ὀργὴν ἀλλ᾽ εἰς περιποίησιν σωτηρίας διὰ τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ
verses.king_james: For God hath not appointed us to wrath, but to obtain salvation by our Lord Jesus Christ,

verses.latin_vulgate: qui mortuus est pro nobis: ut sive vigilemus, sive dormiamus, simul cum illo vivamus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦ ἀποθανόντος ὑπὲρ ἡμῶν ἵνα εἴτε γρηγορῶμεν εἴτε καθεύδωμεν ἅμα σὺν αὐτῷ ζήσωμεν
verses.king_james: Who died for us, that, whether we wake or sleep, we should live together with him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter quod consolamini invicem, et ædificate alterutrum, sicut et facitis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: διὸ παρακαλεῖτε ἀλλήλους καὶ οἰκοδομεῖτε εἷς τὸν ἕνα καθὼς καὶ ποιεῖτε
verses.king_james: Wherefore comfort yourselves together, and edify one another, even as also ye do.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rogamus autem vos, fratres, ut noveritis eos qui laborant inter vos, et præsunt vobis in Domino, et monent vos,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐρωτῶμεν δὲ ὑμᾶς ἀδελφοί εἰδέναι τοὺς κοπιῶντας ἐν ὑμῖν καὶ προϊσταμένους ὑμῶν ἐν κυρίῳ καὶ νουθετοῦντας ὑμᾶς
verses.king_james: And we beseech you, brethren, to know them which labour among you, and are over you in the Lord, and admonish you;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut habeatis illos abundantius in caritate propter opus illorum: pacem habete cum eis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καὶ ἡγεῖσθαι αὐτοὺς ὑπερ ἐκπερισσοῦ ἐν ἀγάπῃ διὰ τὸ ἔργον αὐτῶν εἰρηνεύετε ἐν ἑαυτοῖς
verses.king_james: And to esteem them very highly in love for their work's sake. *And* be at peace among yourselves.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rogamus autem vos, fratres, corripite inquietos, consolamini pusillanimes, suscipite infirmos, patientes estote ad omnes.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: παρακαλοῦμεν δὲ ὑμᾶς ἀδελφοί νουθετεῖτε τοὺς ἀτάκτους παραμυθεῖσθε τοὺς ὀλιγοψύχους ἀντέχεσθε τῶν ἀσθενῶν μακροθυμεῖτε πρὸς πάντας
verses.king_james: Now we exhort you, brethren, warn them that are unruly, comfort the feebleminded, support the weak, be patient toward all *men*.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videte ne quis malum pro malo alicui reddat: sed semper quod bonum est sectamini in invicem, et in omnes.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁρᾶτε μή τις κακὸν ἀντὶ κακοῦ τινι ἀποδῷ ἀλλὰ πάντοτε τὸ ἀγαθὸν διώκετε καὶ εἰς ἀλλήλους καὶ εἰς πάνταςj
verses.king_james: See that none render evil for evil unto any *man*; but ever follow that which is good, both among yourselves, and to all *men*.

verses.latin_vulgate: Semper gaudete.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πάντοτε χαίρετε
verses.king_james: Rejoice evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sine intermissione orate.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀδιαλείπτως προσεύχεσθε
verses.king_james: Pray without ceasing.

verses.latin_vulgate: In omnibus gratias agite: hæc est enim voluntas Dei in Christo Jesu in omnibus vobis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐν παντὶ εὐχαριστεῖτε τοῦτο γὰρ θέλημα θεοῦ ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ εἰς ὑμᾶς
verses.king_james: In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Spiritum nolite extinguere.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τὸ πνεῦμα μὴ σβέννυτε
verses.king_james: Quench not the Spirit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prophetias nolite spernere.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: προφητείας μὴ ἐξουθενεῖτε
verses.king_james: Despise not prophesyings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia autem probate: quod bonum est tenete.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πάντα δοκιμάζετε τὸ καλὸν κατέχετε
verses.king_james: Prove all things; hold fast that which is good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ab omni specie mala abstinete vos.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀπὸ παντὸς εἴδους πονηροῦ ἀπέχεσθε
verses.king_james: Abstain from all appearance of evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse autem Deus pacis sanctificet vos per omnia: ut integer spiritus vester, et anima, et corpus sine querela in adventu Domini nostri Jesu Christi servetur.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: αὐτὸς δὲ ὁ θεὸς τῆς εἰρήνης ἁγιάσαι ὑμᾶς ὁλοτελεῖς καὶ ὁλόκληρον ὑμῶν τὸ πνεῦμα καὶ ἡ ψυχὴ καὶ τὸ σῶμα ἀμέμπτως ἐν τῇ παρουσίᾳ τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ τηρηθείη
verses.king_james: And the very God of peace sanctify you wholly; and *I pray God* your whole spirit and soul and body be preserved blameless unto the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fidelis est, qui vocavit vos: qui etiam faciet.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πιστὸς ὁ καλῶν ὑμᾶς ὃς καὶ ποιήσει
verses.king_james: Faithful *is* he that calleth you, who also will do *it*.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fratres, orate pro nobis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀδελφοί προσεύχεσθε περὶ ἡμῶν
verses.king_james: Brethren, pray for us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salutate fratres omnes in osculo sancto.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀσπάσασθε τοὺς ἀδελφοὺς πάντας ἐν φιλήματι ἁγίῳ
verses.king_james: Greet all the brethren with an holy kiss.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adjuro vos per Dominum ut legatur epistola hæc omnibus sanctis fratribus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὀρκίζω ὑμᾶς τὸν κύριον ἀναγνωσθῆναι τὴν ἐπιστολὴν πᾶσιν τοῖς ἁγίοις ἀδελφοῖς
verses.king_james: I charge you by the Lord that this epistle be read unto all the holy brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gratia Domini nostri Jesu Christi vobiscum. Amen.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἡ χάρις τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ μεθ᾽ ὑμῶν ἀμήν
verses.king_james: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ *be* with you. Amen.
